name: digital-library-orchestrator
description: Root Orchestrator for Digital Library Ecosystem

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd node_service && npm install && cd ../library_service && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.start: concurrently -n "GATEWAY,SPRING,NODE,LIB,FRONTEND" -c "blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan" "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:springboot" "npm run start:node" "npm run start:library" "npm run start:frontend"
